meta.title: AI Agents Invent Algorithm to Survive
meta.description:
The Emergence of Cooperation in Multi-Agent Environments via RL-Optimized In-Context Learning. An optimization of the real tensor weights for a better alignment of and more powerful ICL strategies. WOW. 

New Game-theoretical algorithms. Invented by Google. Presented by me. 

All rights w/ authors:
Multi-agent cooperation through in-context co-player inference
Marissa A. Weis★,1, Maciej Wołczyk★,1, Rajai Nasser1, Rif A. Saurous1, Blaise Agüera y Arcas1,2,
João Sacramento1 and Alexander Meulemans1
from
1 Google, Paradigms of Intelligence Team, 
2 Santa Fe Institute 

@SFIScience @Google @googledeepmind 

#nextgenai 
#googledeepmind 
#aiexplained 
#scienceexplained 
#incontext 
#ailearning 
#artificialintelligence
